mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_SEQ as userId, MEMBER_ID as userLogin, MEMBER_NAME as userName, MEMBER_EMAIL as userEmail, MEMBER_PASSWORD as userPassword, '' as userOu, '0' as userFlags, 'ko' as userLanguage, MEMBER_RECENT_LOGIN as userLastlogin, JOIN_DATETIME as userCreated, NULL as dateExpired FROM MH_EXT_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userLogin} AND ACCOUNT_STATUS = 'A'

SELECT MEMBER_SEQ as userId, MEMBER_ID as userLogin, MEMBER_NAME as userName, MEMBER_EMAIL as userEmail, MEMBER_PASSWORD as userPassword, '' as userOu, '0' as userFlags, 'ko' as userLanguage, MEMBER_RECENT_LOGIN as userLastlogin, JOIN_DATETIME as userCreated, NULL as dateExpired FROM MH_EXT_MEMBER WHERE (MEMBER_ID = #{username} OR MEMBER_EMAIL = #{username}) AND ACCOUNT_STATUS = 'A'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MH_EXT_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{userEmail} AND MEMBER_EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND MEMBER_EMAIL != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MH_EXT_MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PASSWORD, MEMBER_NICKNAME, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_EMAIL, JOIN_DATETIME, MEMBER_RECENT_LOGIN, ACCOUNT_STATUS, MEMBER_PASSWORD_STATUS, MEMBER_GRADE ) VALUES ( #{userLogin}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userName}, #{userEmail}, NOW(), NOW(), 'A', '0', 'F' )
